chokepoints.name: Outbound Webhooks
chokepoints.rationale: Event-emission substrate that real-time subscriptions, reader-side notifications, and coalition aggregation triggers all read from. The orgEvents table the webhook system creates is shared infrastructure.

chokepoints.name: Scroll Mainnet Deployment (Composite)
chokepoints.rationale: DistrictRegistry + DebateMarket + SnapshotAnchor on Scroll Mainnet together. DeployScrollMainnet.s.sol has never been broadcast. Until mainnet ships, accountability anchoring is testnet-only, debate stake verification is $1 placeholder, mainnet DistrictRegistry is missing, and 5-year-survivable claims are aspirational.
chokepoints.elapsed_time_dependency: 1-2 weeks engineering + 2-4 weeks elapsed (security audit completion, Safe multisig coordination, HonkVerifier pre-deployment, governance signing)

chokepoints.name: TEE Nitro Enclave Deployment
chokepoints.rationale: Long-lead-time infra. NitroEnclaveResolver is wired stub; LocalConstituentResolver is active path. Without TEE, the 'AI panel verdicts are themselves verifiable' claim is positional only, and TEE-attested constituent resolution remains aspirational.
chokepoints.elapsed_time_dependency: 2-3 weeks elapsed (AWS Nitro account setup, EC2 provisioning, enclave build, PCR0 measurement, vsock proxy implementation, attestation document chain validation)

chokepoints.name: Delegation Executor + ZK Proof Attachment
chokepoints.rationale: Agent-as-civic-actor with cryptographic provenance is the headline categorical differentiator. FEATURES.DELEGATION=false today. Convex CRUD is complete; no executor exists. Without it, Cluster 4 stays as 'we have some AI for org users' rather than 'AI on action with provenance.'
chokepoints.elapsed_time_dependency: 3-4 weeks for executor + 1.5-2 weeks for proof attachment via draftedMessages table
